candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as requested.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current portion of debt; financing-related and excludes lease liabilities listed separately.
Could be a component of short-term debt, but not a clean total and often zero here.

variables.notes: Preferred clean total short-term interest-bearing debt. Excluded separate lease liabilities per rule and avoided adding overdraft to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Best match for current tax liabilities / taxes payable on the balance sheet.
Non-current deferred taxes, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist; confident it is the current taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred over components or right-of-use assets.
Only a component/alternate limited line, not as strong as total net PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total net PPE line and excluded right-of-use assets.
Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activitie Cash flow from investing activitie
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated label, the values match net cash flow from operating activities (the subtotal before investing starts).

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activitie Cash flow from investing activitie

variables.notes: Chose the concatenated subtotal line because its values reconcile to net cash from operating activities; more appropriate than the pre-working-capital line.
